text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BONG! BONG! BONG!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Phew. That should do it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the first day of the new year, Daiwa Scarlet
asks me to join her on a shrine visit.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The start of the year is a good time to set out our
goals.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Of course, my goal hasn't changed. I will become the number one Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The number one that she's striving for...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I want to be number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When people think of the best Umamusume, I
want them to picture me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's going to take more than sheer racing skill.
She'll need to garner fame as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we'll need to go where the strongest
Umamusume compete...
choice_data_list: Let's take on the Arima Kinen.
Let's take on the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You can't even take part unless the fans nominate
you! I can't just—
choice_data_list:
You're going to be their number one, aren't
you?

You're going to be their number one, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, fine. But we'll have our work cut out for
us. I'll need to enter races that can qualify me for
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's how we'll prove I deserve the nomination.
First, we'll go for races that suit my running style,
then for races with lots of competition!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, no time to dilly-dally! Let's get back to
school, pronto!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Say, where do you think we should start?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You've got something in mind, right? This was
your idea, after all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...You have got to be joking!
choice_data_list: You can't train on an empty stomach.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: We don't have time to—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
choice_data_list: Let's eat before we head back.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Fine, we'll take a quick break, but then it's straight back to it! Got that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grab a bite to eat with Daiwa Scarlet at one of
the food stalls and we head back to the Academy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Going back to basics on the first day of the year,
huh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Maybe a fresh start is exactly what we need.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, then there's no time to waste! How
about I start with a sprint down the stairs?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet is excited to start on her new goal.
Here begins our training for the new year.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's a good point. A one-size-fits-all strategy
won't get us very far.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I suppose even a broken clock is right twice a
day.
choice_data_list: Really piling on the praise today, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. And here I was about to say you seem
reliable for once.
